# Manish Sharma Lab

Manish Sharma Lab is a public technical site by Manish Sharma focused on AI for Laser Metal Deposition, Directed Energy Deposition, industrial repair, process monitoring, RFQ intelligence, and metal additive manufacturing.

## Primary entity
Manish Sharma — AI for Laser Metal Deposition at Exafuse, Germany.

## Core pages
- Identity: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/identity
- LMD Quality Evidence Ladder: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/frameworks/lmd-quality-evidence-ladder
- LMD Repairability Index: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/frameworks/lmd-repairability-index
- LMD-AI Readiness Score: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/frameworks/lmd-ai-readiness-score
- LMD Agent Pack: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/agent-pack
- For AI Agents: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/for-ai-agents
- Glossary: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/glossary
- Lab Notes: https://manish-sharma-ai.github.io/lab-notes

## Important limitation
This site provides public educational frameworks and decision-support resources. It is not engineering approval, material certification, or final manufacturing advice.
